records.m_Talk_ENG: After much debate, you came to the conclusion
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nach langen 95nberlegungen bist du zum Schluss gekommen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apr958s un long moment de r959flexion et de nombreuses d959lib959rations,

records.m_Talk_ENG: that this employee, whom you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: dass diese Mitarbeiterin, 9588ber die du so viel nachgedacht hast, absolut unverzichtbar f9588r die Zukunft des Unternehmens ist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: vous 95xtes arriv959 95p la conclusion que cette employ959e 959tait un 959l959ment vital pour votre entreprise et son futur.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you've decided
records.m_Talk_DEU: Daher hast du beschlossen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Vous avez donc d959cid959

records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with her, no matter the consequences.
records.m_Talk_DEU: sie an dich zu binden, egal was auch geschieht.
records.m_Talk_FRA: de rester 95p ses c9580t959s et la soutenir, peu importe les cons959quences.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also hast du sie in dein B9588ro gerufen. Sie sagte, sie wolle bald da sein.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fort de cette d959cision, vous l'avez convoqu959e dans votre bureau. Elle ne devrait pas tarder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You wanted to see me? I'm coming in.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You wanted to see me? I'm coming in.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You wanted to see me? I'm coming in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's fine. I've already made up my mind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's fine. I've already made up my mind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's fine. I've already made up my mind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm being assigned to the biggest mission since Coffin Company was founded, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm being assigned to the biggest mission since Coffin Company was founded, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm being assigned to the biggest mission since Coffin Company was founded, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's such a big operation, but are you sure you want to discuss it with just me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's such a big operation, but are you sure you want to discuss it with just me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's such a big operation, but are you sure you want to discuss it with just me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...? That's not why you called? Th-then why did you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...? That's not why you called? Th-then why did you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...? That's not why you called? Th-then why did you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A lifetime contract...? Oh... So that's why.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A lifetime contract...? Oh... So that's why.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A lifetime contract...? Oh... So that's why.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It would've been better if you gave me a heads up. I was startled when you suddenly wanted to see me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It would've been better if you gave me a heads up. I was startled when you suddenly wanted to see me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It would've been better if you gave me a heads up. I was startled when you suddenly wanted to see me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? I don't have to do it if I don't want to? N-no. When did I say, I didn't want to?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? I don't have to do it if I don't want to? N-no. When did I say, I didn't want to?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? I don't have to do it if I don't want to? N-no. When did I say, I didn't want to?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's just... I was thinking how better it would be if Sasha was with me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's just... I was thinking how better it would be if Sasha was with me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's just... I was thinking how better it would be if Sasha was with me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This place has everything we wanted. Friends, funny cartoons, and a comfy life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This place has everything we wanted. Friends, funny cartoons, and a comfy life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This place has everything we wanted. Friends, funny cartoons, and a comfy life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am happy, but I also feel a little sad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am happy, but I also feel a little sad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am happy, but I also feel a little sad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we don't protect them, we'll lose everything we have.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we don't protect them, we'll lose everything we have.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we don't protect them, we'll lose everything we have.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sure, I'll sign it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sure, I'll sign it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sure, I'll sign it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't want to see anyone get hurt or broken.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't want to see anyone get hurt or broken.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't want to see anyone get hurt or broken.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll... protect them, no matter what.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll... protect them, no matter what.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll... protect them, no matter what.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For the world... and for Sasha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For the world... and for Sasha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For the world... and for Sasha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here. Did you check? Now, I'll continue to be strong for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here. Did you check? Now, I'll continue to be strong for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here. Did you check? Now, I'll continue to be strong for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you also must always be strong for me too, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you also must always be strong for me too, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you also must always be strong for me too, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because I can't protect the world on my own. Haha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because I can't protect the world on my own. Haha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because I can't protect the world on my own. Haha.
